description: Nick and Ayush discuss the latest updates in the Solana ecosystem, including the simulation of compute units in the Solana CLI, the deprecation of legacy vote instructions, and upcoming events like the Solana Global Hackathon.
topic_summary: In this episode, the hosts cover key developments such as the new compute unit simulation feature in the Solana CLI [t=21:76], the official deprecation of outdated vote instructions [t=60:6], and the transition guide for Agave 2.0 [t=96:79]. They also highlight the upcoming Solana Global Hackathon starting September 2nd [t=233:46].
